Layout.title: next-intl Playground
Layout.tagline: Translations, formatting, routing, and patterns with Next.js.

MixedRoutingDemo.alwaysNote: Every locale, including the default, carries a prefix.
MixedRoutingDemo.asNeededNote: Default locale stays bare; others get a prefix.
MixedRoutingDemo.neverNote: No prefix anywhere — locale is resolved via cookie or header.

LocaleSwitcherDemo.hint: Pick a locale — uses next-intl's typed Link with a locale prop; the URL prefix updates and the layout re-renders with the new locale.
